summary: This is a very brief post where Cathy O'Neil shares a link to a Tumblr page featuring math-themed pick-up lines, suggested to her by mathematician Wei Ho. The post is lighthearted and playful, offering nerdy humor rather than substantive analysis. It represents the casual, community-building side of math blogging.
key_points: Links to a Tumblr page collecting math pick-up lines
Credited to mathematician Wei Ho from Columbia
Positioned as potentially helpful for 'nerds' in social situations
money_quotes: I am thinking it might help out a lot of nerds.
key_insight: Even serious math bloggers occasionally share lighthearted content that celebrates nerd culture and mathematical humor.
